controls.few_shot_policy: embedded benchmark-facing label-policy examples per family

hypothesis: C-track C1 arm: five full-note per-family parallel extracts with v1.2 label policies and v2b frequency post-stack isolated to seizure_frequency establishes a quality/efficiency ceiling versus paper-frozen single-pass v2b on cap-25.
metric_caveats: This diagnostic validation cap is the preregistered C-track ceiling gate; it is not a full-validation performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S5 diagnostics (five core families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
